meal: Generic Protein & Veg Tray Bake / Stir-Fry

ingredients.item: Protein — boneless skinless chicken thighs, 200g (or swap: chicken breast ~330 kcal, prawns 200g ~160 kcal, tuna 2 tins ~220 kcal, turkey mince 200g ~280 kcal)
Seasoning — Nando's sauce / soy + garlic / lemon + herbs / fajita spice

notes: This is the default template. Swap the protein and seasoning to rotate without thinking. Tray bake: 200°C, 35–40 mins. Stir-fry: high heat, 10 mins. Peas are the highest-carb veg here — skip them if you want to cut another 40 kcal and 7g carbs. Macros shown are for chicken thighs; adjust if swapping protein.
